item.title: Download muCommander 1.6.1 + Portable
item.description: muCommander is a lightweight, cross-platform file manager with a two-pane interface. It runs on any operating system with Java support (Mac OS X, Windows, Linux, *BSD, Solaris...). Features of muCommander Virtual file system that supports local drives, FTP, SFTP, SMB, NFS, HTTP, Amazon S3, Hadoop HDFS, and Bonjour Quickly copy, move, rename files, create folders, email files... item.title: Download KILHO AutoClick 1.5.1

It allows users to define specific click points and automatically click at those locations. This tool is user-friendly and supports recording click sequences for repeated use.
